sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110340" key="farmako/mantis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φαρμᾰκό-μαντις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, either <sense id="n110340.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who is at once</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φαρμακός</foreign> and <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μάντις,</foreign> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">who uses</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φάρμακα</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to divine from,</tr_> title of play by Anaxandrides.</sense> </entryFree>
